days.summary: ByteDance officially launched Seed 2.0 and previewed Dola-Seed-2.0-Preview alongside a new Full-Duplex Speech LLM, marking a meaningful push into multimodal and voice-native model competition. OpenAI detailed the Windows sandbox architecture behind Codex and paired it with two months of free enterprise usage for switchers, signaling a more aggressive move to win coding-agent deployments. A new paper, "Negation Neglect," showed that fine-tuning on documents that explicitly deny false claims can still teach models to internalize those falsehoods, highlighting a material reliability risk for post-training pipelines.
